rulings.Case Title: EVENECEL VILLANUEVA et al VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 27, 2014, Line 1: DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO FOURT AMENDED COMPLAINT: CONTINUED to July 19, 2014. Plaintiff failed to re-notice their opposition and failed to provide courtesy copies of their papers to the Court. See SF Local Rules 2.6B. Plaintiff is to provide Department 501 with courtesy copies of their opposition. Also, Defendant's failed to attach a copy of the fourth amended complaint to their demurrer. See SF Local Rules 2.6C. = (501/req)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN SOLLNER VS. NORTH BEACH PARTNERS LLC, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Tpo Compel Ptlf'S Verified Responses To Writen Discovery With All Objections Waived
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 27, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT NORTH BEACH PARTNERS LLC's Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Verified Responses To Written Discovery: GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to serve timely responses. See CCP 2030.290. Defendant is awarded attorney's fees in the amount of $935. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GREG BURGHART VS. DANIEL O'NEILL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Relating To: (1)Defendants' Spoliation Of Evidence; And (2)Defendants' Failure To Comply With This Court'S Order To Preserve Evidence;Request For Issue. Evidentiary And Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 27, 2014, Line 5: PLAINTIFF GREG BURGHART's Motion For Sanctions Relating To: (1) Defendants' Spoliation Of Evidence; And (2) Defendants' Failure To Comply With This Court'S Order To Preserve Evidence; Request For Evidentiary And Monetary Sanctions: DENIED. Defendants complied with the Court's order in good faith. Furthermore, no intentional destruction of evidence occurred. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THERESA LYNNE MURPHY VS. NO. 11 HIGH STREET CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Against Pltf Theresa Murphy
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 27, 2014, Line 6: DEFENDANT RYAN RALEY's Motion to Deem Plaintiff Theresa Murphy a vexatious litigant: GRANTED. Plaintiff is a vexatious litigant. See CCP 391(b). Plaintiff has repeatedly re-litigated the validity of previously determined claims and has also maintained at least five litigations, in propria persona in the last seven years. Additionally, there is no reasonable probability that she will prevail in the litigation against the moving defendant. CCP § 391.1. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EILEEN DUFFY et al VS. MURPHY INVESTMENTS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn And Ntc Of Hearing On Mtn For Ccp Section 425.16 Special Mtn To Strk (Anti-Slapp) Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 27, 2014, Line 7: DEFENDANTS MURPHY INVESTMENTS and BART MURPHY's Anti-SLAPP Motion per CCP Section 425.16: DENIED. Defendant failed to show Plaintiffs' cause of action arose from protected activity under CCP section 425.16, e.g. that it was sent in contemplation of litigation. Even if the cause of action did arise from protected activity, Plaintiff can show a reasonable likelihood of success on the merits under CCP section 425.16, because Defendant failed to provide notice to Plaintiffs as required by SFRO section 12.19. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EILEEN DUFFY et al VS. MURPHY INVESTMENTS et al
